name: He's Coming To Me
original_name: เขามาเชงเม้งที่ข้างๆหลุมผมครับ
overview: After his death, Met is a ghost that is consumed by loneliness. That is until he meets a strange boy that can see him. The two bond in a state of happiness and joy as they develop into friends. But what happens when Met falls for the boy who is alive?

trailers.title: เขามาเชงเม้งข้างๆหลุมผมครับ [Official Trailer]
